title: Life in Biblical Israel
author: Philip J. King; Lawrence E. Stager
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted monograph. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Synthesis of Israelite daily life and material culture: houses and construction, dress and textiles, food production, water systems, tools, and household organization. Primary anchor for material-culture claims (mudbrick construction, dress, wells, household scale).
confidenceNotes: Card seeded from team knowledge; page-level citations to be added during the citation verification pass (M1).
